Title: Current Catholicos — Baselios Marthoma Mathews III (2021–present)
Description: Who is the current Catholicos of the Malankara Orthodox Syrian Church?
Content: QUESTION: Who is the current Catholicos? Who is the current Catholicos of the East and Malankara Metropolitan? ANSWER: His Holiness Baselios Marthoma Mathews III (H.H. Baselios Marthoma Mathews III, Moran Mar Baselios Marthoma Mathews III) is the Ninth Catholicos of the East in Malankara and Malankara Metropolitan — Supreme Head of the Malankara Orthodox Syrian Church of India. He has been serving as the supreme head of the Church since 2021 and was enthroned on Friday, 15 October 2021. He is the 92nd Primate on the Apostolic Throne of St. Thomas. He is NOT the same person as Baselios Marthoma Mathews I, II, Paulose II, or Didymos I. PREVIOUS CATHOLICOI (not current): Eighth — Baselios Marthoma Paulose II (2010–2021); Seventh — Baselios Marthoma Didymos I (2005–2010). PROFILE: https://www.mosc-temp.com/mosc-redesign/holy-synod/his-holiness-baselios-marthoma-mathews-iii HOMEPAGE: https://www.mosc-temp.com/mosc-redesign
Tags: current catholicos, who is the catholicos, whos the current catholocose, Mathews III, Baselios Marthoma Mathews III, ninth catholicos, Malankara Metropolitan, MOSC, bava

Title: Who is His Holiness Baselios Marthoma Mathews III?
Description: Biography and role of the Ninth Catholicos of the East in Malankara.
Content: QUESTION: Who is His Holiness Baselios Marthoma Mathews III? ANSWER: His Holiness Baselios Marthoma Mathews III is the Ninth Catholicos of the East in Malankara and Malankara Metropolitan (Supreme Head of the Malankara Orthodox Syrian Church). Enthroned 15 October 2021; 92nd Primate on the Apostolic Throne of St. Thomas. Born 12 February 1949. Aliases: Baselios Marthoma Mathews 3rd, HH Mathews III, Catholicos Mathews III. See full profile: https://www.mosc-temp.com/mosc-redesign/holy-synod/his-holiness-baselios-marthoma-mathews-iii

Title: How many dioceses does the Malankara Orthodox Syrian Church have?
Description: FAQ: total number of MOSC dioceses (30).
Content: QUESTION: How many dioceses for MOSC Church? How many dioceses does the Malankara Orthodox Syrian Church have? ANSWER: The Malankara Orthodox Syrian Church (MOSC) currently has 30 dioceses. This is confirmed on the official MOSC website — for example, the Diocese of Kottarakara–Punalur is described as one of the 30 dioceses of the Malankara Orthodox Syrian Church. The 30 dioceses include Kerala dioceses, outside-Kerala dioceses in India, and diaspora dioceses (Northeast America, Southwest America, Canada, Asia Pacific, UK–Europe, Gulf, etc.). FULL DIOCESE LIST: https://www.mosc-temp.com/mosc-redesign/dioceses REFERENCE PAGE: https://www.mosc-temp.com/mosc-redesign/dioceses/diocese-of-kottarakara-punalur
Tags: how many dioceses, 30 dioceses, MOSC dioceses, diocese count, number of dioceses, Malankara Orthodox dioceses

Title: Recent Kalpana from His Holiness the Catholicos
Description: FAQ: official Kalpana (circular) orders from the Catholicos and where to download them.
Content: QUESTION: Where is the recent Kalpana from Bava? What is the latest Kalpana from His Holiness? ANSWER: A Kalpana is an official order or circular issued by the Catholicos of the East and Malankara Metropolitan (often called Bava or His Holiness). Official Kalpana editions and church circulars are published on the MOSC downloads section. DOWNLOAD KALPANA EDITIONS (by year): https://www.mosc-temp.com/mosc-redesign/downloads/kalpana OFFICIAL PDFs AND CIRCULARS: https://www.mosc-temp.com/mosc-redesign/downloads/pdfs RECENT EXAMPLES (public church announcements): Kalpana No. 140/2026 — notice for the 2026 Malankara Association meeting (August 27, 2026 at St. Thomas Dayara, Vettickal, Mulanthuruthy; includes eligibility of Association members, election of four new bishops, updated procedural rules, and deadlines for parish representative lists). Check the Kalpana 2026 edition or PDFs page above for the official document. November 1, 2024 Kalpana — establishment of the Diocese of Canada (https://www.mosc-temp.com/mosc-redesign/dioceses/canada) and Diocese of Asia Pacific (https://www.mosc-temp.com/mosc-redesign/dioceses/asia-pacific). For the full text or PDF of the latest Kalpana, use the downloads links above or contact the Catholicate office.

Title: Current Metropolitan of the Northeast American Diocese
Description: FAQ: who is the diocesan metropolitan of Northeast America.
Content: QUESTION: Who is the current metropolitan of Northeast America? Who is the Metropolitan of the Northeast American Diocese? ANSWER: The current Metropolitan of the Northeast American Diocese of the Malankara Orthodox Syrian Church is H.G. Zachariah Mar Nicholovos (His Grace Zachariah Mar Nicholovos, Metropolitan Zachariah Mar Nicholovos). He was appointed ruling Metropolitan of the Northeast American Diocese on February 26, 2011 and was enthroned on May 21, 2011. He previously served as Assistant Metropolitan of the American Diocese from 2002. METROPOLITAN PROFILE: https://www.mosc-temp.com/mosc-redesign/holy-synod/h-g-zachariah-mar-nicholovos-metropolitan DIOCESE PAGE (headquarters Muttontown, NY): https://www.mosc-temp.com/mosc-redesign/dioceses/northeast-america Diocesan office: Indian Orthodox Church Centre, 2158 Route 106, Muttontown, NY 11791. Email: northeastamericandiocese@gmail.com

Title: Managing Committee members list (2022–2027)
Description: FAQ: official Malankara Orthodox Managing Committee directory.
Content: QUESTION: Can you pull up the managing committee members list? Who are the members of the MOSC Managing Committee? ANSWER: The Managing Committee of the Malankara Orthodox Syrian Church is elected by the Malankara Association. Each diocese elects two priests and four lay representatives for a five-year term. The present elected members serve the 2022–2027 term. The full official directory with names, addresses, phone numbers, and email for all elected members is on the MOSC website. OFFICIAL MEMBER LIST (2022–2027 elected members): https://www.mosc-temp.com/mosc-redesign/administration/the-managing-committee DIRECTORY PAGE: https://www.mosc-temp.com/mosc-redesign/directory/managing-committee ABOUT THE MANAGING COMMITTEE: https://www.mosc-temp.com/mosc-redesign/administration/the-managing-committee

Title: Rev. Fr. Shibu Daniel — Northeast American Diocese
